details: Tracking-service-config@90.0.0 defines a dependency ("base-package") pointing to an attacker-controlled external HTTP URL (hxxp://npm[.]ezequielpuig[.]space/) rather than the npm registry. When this package is installed, npm resolves the dependency from that external URL, which can serve arbitrary malicious code to the victim's build pipeline. The package ships no actual source code (empty index.js) — its sole function is as a dependency-confusion vector to inject attacker-controlled packages into the install chain via the non-registry dependency specifier. Version 90.0.0 is a version-squat intended to be preferred over legitimate versions.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
